commands: backend: python manage.py makemigrations execution trading --check --dry-run
expected_results: With the feature flag OFF (default) the dispatcher is a no-op: nothing claimed, candidate stays PENDING, no NotificationDelivery.
With the flag ON, a PENDING WIN candidate → SENT via the dry-run transport; NotificationDelivery result=SENT, transmitted=False, correlation preserved, rendered_message non-empty, attempt=1.
SUPPRESSED candidates are ignored (no delivery, stay SUPPRESSED); SENT candidates are never re-dispatched (idempotent).
A transport error → candidate FAILED (audit detail 'transport raised'); a FAILED candidate retries on a later run → SENT (attempt 2).
The dispatcher never creates/modifies a Trade or TradeOutcomeRecord and only updates NotificationCandidate.status.

The dry-run transport renders a TelegramMessageEnvelope with every contract field (title/summary/strategy/symbol/direction/reference_entry/actual_fill/stop_loss/take_profit/profit/pips/execution_timestamp/correlation_id/rendered_message) and returns transmitted=False.

No notifications module imports requests/urllib/http/socket/telegram/telethon/httpx; transport/dispatcher import no execution business logic; the dispatcher references no order_send/ExecutionJob/promote.
Migrations additive (status choices + NotificationDelivery); full backend suite green; secret-scan + governance pass.
actual_results: execution.tests_notification_transport: Ran 16 tests OK (incl. PROCESSING reaper: orphaned→reclaimed→retried→SENT; recent PROCESSING not reaped).
FeatureFlagTests: flag OFF → no-op, candidate PENDING, 0 deliveries PASS.

LifecycleTests: dry-run SENT (transmitted False, correlation preserved, attempt 1) PASS; suppressed ignored PASS; idempotent (re-run keeps 1 delivery) PASS; transport error → FAILED (detail 'transport raised') PASS; ok=False → FAILED PASS; retry FAILED→SENT with attempts [(1,FAILED),(2,SENT)] PASS; no Trade/outcome mutation PASS.

RenderingTests: envelope has all 14 contract fields, symbol/direction/actual_fill/profit/correlation/strategy correct, rendered_message contains symbol + correlation PASS; deliver never transmits PASS.
CommandTests: dispatch_notifications (flag on) → candidate SENT PASS.

BoundaryTests: no requests/urllib/http/socket/telegram/telethon/httpx import in any package module; transport.py/dispatcher.py import no signal_planning/promotion/auto_router/close_monitor/outcome_router/signal_proposals; dispatcher references no order_send/order_check/agent_order/ExecutionJob/promote_plan_to_shadow_jobs/sendMessage PASS.
Full backend suite: Ran 435 tests OK (post-hardening).
makemigrations execution trading --check: No changes detected; make secret-scan OK; governance-check OK; EVIDENCE-LINT PASS.

Adversarial 3-lens transport-boundary review: GO, no must-fix, no boundary violation. Two liveness findings (orphaned PROCESSING) fail CLOSED; hardened here via updated_at + a timeout reaper + a guarded finalize (demote PROCESSING->FAILED on error) before the flag is ever enabled.
limitations: Repo-only, DRY-RUN only — no Telegram message is transmitted, no bot token / chat id / credential is read, no HTTP request or network traffic occurs, no deploy, no WIMS, no order_send, no E3.
The dispatcher is behind the NOTIFICATION_DISPATCH_ENABLED feature flag (default OFF) and is not wired to any scheduler; even when ON, the only transport is dry-run.

A candidate that stalls in PROCESSING (a crash between the atomic claim and the final update) is reclaimed to FAILED by a timeout reaper (NOTIFICATION_PROCESSING_TIMEOUT_SECONDS, default 300) at the start of a dispatch run, and a DB error during finalize demotes it to FAILED — so it is retried, never orphaned. It fails closed regardless (nothing is ever transmitted).

Message wording is a DRAFT: this packet defines the envelope CONTRACT, not final copy. reference_entry/SL/TP are best-effort from the linked plan (blank where unavailable, as no real signal-originated trade exists yet).
